basics.name: Ritabrata Paul
basics.label: Full Stack Web Developer & DevOps Engineer
basics.summary: Full Stack Web Developer and DevOps Engineer with hands-on experience across the MERN stack, Python backends (Django, Flask, FastAPI), and cloud/DevOps tooling (AWS, Azure, GCP, Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Terraform, CI/CD). Builds production web applications end to end and automates deployment pipelines. Additional focus on cybersecurity and secure coding.

work.name: Royal Research
work.summary: In-depth technical research in back-end web development.
highlights: Conducting in-depth technical research in Back-End Web Development (MERN Stack, Django REST Framework, Flask, ASP.NET Core, ASP.NET Web API, CSS).
Utilizing expertise in Kali Linux and FastAPI to develop and implement innovative solutions.
Collaborating with cross-functional teams to integrate cutting-edge technologies, frameworks and DevOps technologies.

work.name: Indium Software (India) Private Limited
highlights: Efficiently automated deployment pipelines and infrastructure configurations.
Implemented robust monitoring and logging systems.
Collaborated with development and operations teams to streamline workflows and foster CI/CD practices.

internships.name: MockPI
highlights: Implemented frontend and backend development using OpenAI technology.
Integrated databases for efficient data management and retrieval.
Enhanced website UI/UX for a dynamic, user-friendly experience.

internships.name: Suvidha Foundation
highlights: Enhanced and optimized company website with innovative designs.
Ensured cross-platform functionality and responsiveness.

internships.name: Solar Secure Solution

projects.name: Pencraft (Author-Portal)
projects.description: E-commerce site with backend data management.
highlights: Built an e-commerce site using React, Commerce.js, Material UI, Node.js, MySQL.

projects.name: Recipe Generation From Food Image
projects.description: Python system generating recipes from food images.
highlights: Built a Python-based system for recipe generation from food images using OpenCV.
Implemented image processing algorithms to extract relevant information.

projects.name: Nowdays (Chat Application)
highlights: Built a real-time chat application using Express.js, React.js, Socket.io, MongoDB, Node.js.
Implemented web sockets for real-time messaging.

projects.name: Hospital Management System
highlights: Built a web-based Hospital Management System using PHP and JavaScript.
Implemented patient record management, appointment scheduling, and inventory tracking.
